source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open LockedIn, the LinkedIn-like professional network app at http://localhost:3014 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Start a new post and publish exactly this text to your feed: "Thrilled to announce Dunder Mifflin Scranton crushed Q2 paper targets#LP55. Proud of this team!"
